field_policy: existing Feishu fields only; never create, delete, or update table fields during daily import; existing orders update only 交易状态

ads.file: docs\data\ShopOps\0609\拼多多\商品推广_账户_分天数据_20260602至20260608.xls

unique_rules.ads: ads_platform_code_yyyy-mm-dd; fallback match by platform + date
unique_rules.influencer: Douyin influencer data must come from an explicit Douyin commission Excel, never from Douyin order exports; fallback match by platform + order_no
unique_rules.orders: platform_code + '_' + order_no; fallback match by order_no
